description: Style Note Without compromising on comfort, make sure your little one looks cute and fresh in these leggings from madagascar 3. Clothes in soothing pastel shades and soft fabric ensure that kids stay comfortable throughout the day. Product Description Blue leggings with a soft elasticated waistband, white piping along the sides, a graphic print in front on the left thigh and elasticated at the hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Wash with like colours Dry immediately after wash Iron on reverse
